phases.name: Write scorer tests
phases.reasoning: Write all 15+ tests in src/cmd/autoresearch/scorer.rs covering: parse_location (4 tests), keyword_overlap (4 tests), FindingMatcher::matches_expected (3 tests), FindingMatcher::matches_must_not_flag (3 tests), Scorer::score recall (2), precision (2), composite (1), edge cases (2). Add minimal stub types (Finding, SpecialistScore, ParsedLocation) and function signatures that compile but panic/return defaults so tests compile but fail. Register pub mod scorer in mod.rs.

phases.name: Implement scorer engine
phases.reasoning: Implement parse_location (regex or manual parsing for file:line-line, file:line, line N-N, empty), tokenize helper (lowercase, split on non-alphanumeric, filter stop words), keyword_overlap (tokenize both, compute intersection/expected_tokens), FindingMatcher::matches_expected (parse location, check file basename match, check line within ±5 tolerance, check keyword overlap >0.50), FindingMatcher::matches_must_not_flag (keyword overlap >0.60 OR location match), Scorer::score (iterate must_finds for recall, iterate findings for false positives/precision, compute composite 0.4R+0.3P+0.3A), Display impl for SpecialistScore. All 15+ tests must pass, cargo clippy clean.
